title: Financial
description: Unintended, excessive, or obscured spending of real money.

title: Time / attention
description: Engineered overuse and degraded digital wellbeing; time captured beyond what the player intended to give.

title: Data / privacy
description: Over-disclosure, tracking, and profiling — often to target subsequent solicitations.

title: Autonomy / choice
description: Subverted or bypassed agency; decisions steered away from what the player would freely choose.

title: Social / relational
description: Exploited friendships and reputational or guilt pressure exerted through peers and networks.

title: Emotional / psychological
description: Anxiety, regret, frustration, and addiction-adjacent harm produced or amplified by the design.

title: Competitive fairness
description: Pay-to-win dynamics that undermine the implicit contract of skill-based competition.
